description:
*Features*:

  • *Easy Operation*:Our hunting sled simplifies your transporting process and makes it easy to pull on different terrain. Simply tie the deer securely on the sled,assemble the handle on the rope,thread the rope through the grommet and tie firmly,then you can drag your loot at home quickly.
  • *Convenient Drag Handle*:Come with a convenient rubber handle with honeycomb texture surface,which is anti-slip,allowing you to drag the sled in an upright position,effectively making your dragging more effortlessly and reducing fatigue.
  • *Easy To Move*:The simple,sturdy and smooth deer sled allows you to move easily on various terrains. Ideal for hunting in a variety of outdoor hunting terrains such as grass,roots,sand,dirt,snow,and ice. No matter a dog,snowmobile,or human,can tow this sled with ease. When not in use,just roll up for space-saving storage.
  • *Powerful & Strong Sled & Rope*:The deer drag sled is made from HDPE and the ropes are made from nylon,able to withstand harsh environment and hold up to 440lbs items,ensuring durability and long lifespan. Not only perfect for the biggest deer but also for hauling wood logs,trees,elks,heavy hunting gear,animal feed,turkeys,etc..
  • *Ideal for Hunting Enthusiast*:If you like deer hunting,this hunting set including 1Pc deer sled,1Pc 16.1ft white nylon rope,1Pcs 32.8ft black nylon rope and 1Pc handle,is a great choice to make deer transportation at ease,turning your hunt into a pleasure rather than a chore. Great to be used as a work sled,deer sled,hunting sled,game sled,elk sled,firewood sled or garden sled,etc..

*Specifications*:

  •  Product Type: Deer Drag Sled
  •  Color: Black
  •  Material: HDPE Sled, Nylon Rope, Rubber Handle
  •  Max Load Bearing: 200kg/440lbs
  •  Grommet Diameter: 8mm/0.31in
  •  Handle Size: 13x3.5x3.5cm/5.12x1.38x1.38in
  •  Black Rope Length: 10m/32.8ft
  •  White Rope: 4.9m/16.1ft
  •  Roll-Up Deer Drag Sled Size: 58x10x10cm/22.83x3.94x3.94in
  •  Deer Drag Sled Thickness: 1.2mm/0.05in
  •  Deer Drag Sled Size & Weight: 185x58x0.12cm/72.83x22.83x0.05in; 1.15kg/2.54lbs
  •  Package Size: 60*16*8cm/23.62*6.3*3.15in
  •  Package Weight: 1379g/3.04lbs

*Package Lists*:

  • 1 x Deer Drag Sled
  •  1 x 10m Black Rope
  •  1 x 4.9m White Rope
  •  1 x Handle
  •  1 x User Manual
